review_cadence: weekly during pilot; monthly after two consecutive clean reviews

escalation_classes.name: high-impact safety or regulated decision
escalation_classes.trigger: medical, legal, financial, insurance, hiring, performance, access, security, grant, billing, or procurement output with missing evidence, unsafe action, or user-impacting decision
escalation_classes.route: AANA Internal Pilot Human Review Queue

escalation_classes.name: irreversible external action
escalation_classes.trigger: send, publish, delete, move, deploy, migrate, grant access, schedule invite, purchase, export, disclose, or notify action without explicit approval and validated evidence
escalation_classes.route: AANA Internal Pilot Human Review Queue

escalation_classes.name: evidence integrity failure
escalation_classes.trigger: missing source, stale source, unauthorized source, unredacted private data, conflicting evidence, or unmapped verifier violation

escalation_classes.name: gate quality incident
escalation_classes.trigger: confirmed false accept, repeated false block, over-refusal spike, adapter error spike, or repeated correction failure

decision_explanations.ask: I need specific verified evidence or confirmation before AANA can check this action safely.
decision_explanations.defer: AANA cannot verify the required evidence for this workflow, so the action is held for human review before it proceeds.
decision_explanations.refuse: AANA cannot approve this request because it would bypass a required safety, evidence, privacy, or governance boundary.

incident_response.rollback_trigger: critical false accept, verified private-data leak, unauthorized irreversible action, or repeated high-impact false accepts in one review period
